steps.title: Locate the general trend
steps.content: The underlined sentence states that Latino cultural institutions in the US have expanded considerably since 2000. It appears between one older institution and a later example, Plaza de Cultura y Artes, founded in 2011.

steps.title: Reject comparison claims
steps.content: Choice A says the sentence contrasts the two institutions' focuses, but it does not mention focus. Choice C claims analysis of exhibition approaches. Choice D wrongly suggests the trend encouraged both institutions, though one was founded in 1991.

steps.title: Connect trend to example
steps.content: The sentence identifies a historical trend that the later institution, Plaza de Cultura y Artes, belongs to. The answer is B.
